# Templates

This directory contains reusable templates for project documentation.

## Available Templates

- [Agent Blueprint Template](./agents_blueprints/_template_agent_blueprint.md): Template for defining AI agent roles and prompts.
- [Module Format Template](./agents_blueprints/format_module_template.md): Template for documenting code modules.
- [Project Context Template](./agents_blueprints/format_project_contex.md): Template for project context documentation.
- [Problem Statement Template](./agents_blueprints/problem_statement_template.md): Template for writing problem statements.
